curriculum_context.concept: bounded worker-pool dispatch with priority, retry/backoff, DLQ, backpressure, idempotency
curriculum_context.mechanic: task forge: hopper + N arms + annealing rack + scrap chute
curriculum_context.accepted_signal: correct next-dispatch prediction AND correct retry/DLQ classification AND held backpressure + idempotency
curriculum_context.rejected_trap: requeuing poison / overflowing hopper / enqueuing a duplicate sigil
